name: O.R.C. Wasp
description: The O.R.C. Wasp is the militarized version of the standard wasp and acts as airborne pressure artillery. It keeps its speed and accuracy, but now enters combat with far less breathing room for the player.
behavior: It patrols high above O.R.C. zones and dives into combat very quickly once it spots a target. It mixes aggressive entries with ranged shots so you never feel like you truly reset spacing.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and punishes exposed vertical positioning very hard. If you mishandle the first entry, the stinger shot keeps you uncomfortable even while healing or repositioning.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually accompanies O.R.C. waves as air support, harassing or finishing targets already pinned by grounded units.
strategy: Salty is still the best answer. Punish after the charged sting and avoid chasing blindly while it still has a clear line to shoot from outside melee range.

abilities.name: Sting
abilities.description: A quick sting once it has closed enough distance.

abilities.name: Charged Sting
abilities.description: It pulls back for a moment and then drives in with much more force.

abilities.name: Stinger Shot
abilities.description: It shoots from mid-range to keep pressure even when it cannot dive in directly.
